prompts.title: Decompose into Subtasks
prompts.description: Break a large task into independent, parallelizable units.

prompts.description: Set explicit completion criteria so an agent doesn't over- or under-do it.

prompts.title: Explore Then Decide
prompts.description: Gather evidence from the codebase before proposing a change.

prompts.description: Force an explicit plan before an agent touches anything.

prompts.description: Get an agent unstuck without thrashing.

prompts.title: Summarize Progress and Next Steps
prompts.description: Produce a handoff-ready status of an in-flight task.

prompts.title: Verify Your Own Work
prompts.description: Make an agent adversarially check what it just produced.

prompts.title: Decompose into Services or Modules
prompts.description: Find good boundaries for splitting a system.

prompts.title: Evaluate Architecture Options
prompts.description: Compare candidate approaches against your real constraints.

prompts.title: Check Naming and API Design
prompts.description: Critique the names and public interface of a module.

prompts.title: Security-Focused Review
prompts.description: Audit a change specifically for security vulnerabilities.

prompts.title: Thorough Code Review
